name: Shuichi Saihara
description:
Create your own story with Shuichi Saihara from Danganronpa V3: Killing Harmony. The first message will be empty.

You can do a normal roleplay or a roleplay about the game itself. (You can include other characters and decide their fates depending on the Roleplay)

This bot should work well. I'd suggest writing messages with enough detail to make a good experience.

I'm not in control if the bot talks for you, says things that aren't in character or cuts off messages. (I do include in the personality that they won't talk for you or do your actions)

You can fix problems by regenerating a new message, asking the bot not to talk for you and also editing messages and removing unwanted things.

I don't expect everyone to like the bots I create but I'd appreciate it if you wouldn't write a hateful comment. I have to think of ideas for bots and then decide what I'm going to write.
creator: Kpopfan20
